idea-plugin.name: npm quick
idea-plugin.description:
npm quick is a lightweight and powerful plugin that allows you to discover and run npm, pnpm, and yarn scripts instantly from a searchable popup, without leaving your code.

✨ Features

  • 🚀 Instant Access: Press Cmd + Option + N (macOS) or Ctrl + Alt + N (Windows/Linux) to open a searchable list of all scripts found in your package.json.
  • ⚡️ Smart Detection: Automatically detects npm, pnpm, or yarn based on your lock files.
  • 📜 Execution History: Keeps a history of executed scripts in a dedicated Tool Window.
  • 👀 Interactive Console: View logs and interact with running processes (supports input).
  • 🛑 Process Control: Stop running scripts directly from the toolbar.
  • 🌍 Internationalization: Available in English and Spanish.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
2.0.0

  • 🛠 Major update: Migrated to IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.0.
  • 🔧 Full compatibility with IntelliJ 2024.1+ and future versions.
  • 🐛 Fixed binary incompatibility issues with JSON module.

1.0.3

  • 🔧 Fixed compatibility range to support all IDE versions from 2023.2 onwards.

1.0.2

  • 🔧 Removed upper version limit to support all future IDE versions.

1.0.1

  • 🎨 Updated plugin icon.

1.0.0

  • 🚀 Initial Release.
  • ✨ Smart Discovery of npm/pnpm/yarn scripts.
  • ⌨️ Quick Access via shortcut.
  • 🖥 Interactive Console and Execution History.
  • 🛑 Process Control (Stop, Clear, Remove).

action.description: Run npm scripts from a searchable list
